since_last: 43% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.70%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.91% · BTC -2.37% · Gold -0.64% · Nasdaq100 -2.32%. 43% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.70%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.70%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -5.23%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -9.51%
cards.body: Leaders: PINS +4.46%, IBM +4.21%, MGNI +3.15%, NOW +2.92%, SAP +2.81%. Laggards: MU -9.51%, TER -9.20%, KLAC -8.77%, LRCX -8.76%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.09% at $156.29
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.09% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
